sizing_rule.note: Scale position size inversely to standard deviation of returns (max 2σ). Deleveraging trigger when capital grows 100%; minimum 2 uncorrelated positions for diversification. Lookback period: 63 trading days.

source_rule_text: A trader should adjust position sizing by diversifying and deleveraging as capital grows, or continue leveraging profits only if willing to accept complete loss risk; position size should be controlled by measuring worst-case risk through standard deviation of returns.
